items.html: Indeed, her Kli [vessel] is her Yesod; and the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] are the five Gevurot of her portion, which she takes at the time of the Nesirah [sawing apart], as above. But those five Gevurot of his own are called Rucha Dilei de Shavik be Gavah [his spirit that he leaves in her]. For ZA [Zeir Anpin] is the secret of Ruach [spirit]; but when it is placed in her it is called Nefesh — "as her Nefesh was departing" — and therefore it is called a son and not a daughter. And since it is in the secret of back to back, it is not a complete Zivug [coupling], only Rucha de Shadi be Gavah [a spirit that he casts into her]. And it is the root for raising all the clarifications until the days of the Messiah, and it is the root of them all, for it is the first root of BON; and through it all the clarifications of the Melachim [kings] of ZON are clarified.
